title: Community Question Answering
description: Answer quality classification for community forum question-answer pairs, based on SemEval-2017 Task 3. Annotators judge whether a given answer is good, potentially useful, or bad with respect to the original question.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 11th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2017)",
    year = "2017",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/S17-2003"
